body.title: Add BG scoring dump to turn trace
body.result: Added _emit_bg() helper to select_habit() that emits bg_scoring stage to TurnContext on every scoring pass: top-5 candidates with id/score/type, winner, milieu-modulated threshold, near-miss count, and decision rationale. Covers all 4 exit paths (winner, no-candidates, compile-phrase, notebook pre-checks). Fire-and-forget — never crashes main loop. 12 tests. Commit 99562ca.
body.description: Emit top 5 BG candidates with scores, winner, and decision rationale into the turn trace on each scoring pass. Modify basal_ganglia.select_habit() to return scoring details alongside the winner. Turn recorder writes them to turn_traces. Makes habit selection observable and self-debuggable.
